# ADR-0002: Second decision

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-06

## Context

A second well-formed decision, sequential to ADR-0001, no seeded violations.

## Decision

Use this as the other half of the clean-baseline fixture.

## Consequences

None — this is the negative control for the fixture corpus.
